<?php namespace Spatie\LaravelRay\DumpRecorder; class MultiDumpHandler { /** @var array */ protected $handlers = []; public function dump($value) { foreach ($this->handlers as $handler) { $handler($value); } } public function addHandler(?callable $callable = null): self { $this->handlers[] = $callable; return $this; } public function resetHandlers(): void { $this->handlers = []; } }
